_comment: The Merchant's Guild — Magic Item Catalog. Organized by rarity with dual descriptions, tier requirements, store type tags, and attunement flags.

items.name: Potion of Healing
items.descriptionDM: A creature that drinks this potion regains 2d4+2 hit points. The potion's red liquid glimmers when agitated.
items.descriptionPlayer: A small vial of shimmering red liquid that sloshes gently

items.name: Spell Scroll (Fire Bolt)
items.descriptionDM: A spell scroll bearing the Fire Bolt cantrip. A spellcaster can use this scroll to cast Fire Bolt without material components.
items.descriptionPlayer: A rolled parchment sealed with a faintly warm wax stamp

items.name: Spell Scroll (Light)
items.descriptionDM: A spell scroll bearing the Light cantrip.
items.descriptionPlayer: A rolled parchment that seems to glow faintly at the edges

items.name: Spell Scroll (Mending)
items.descriptionDM: A spell scroll bearing the Mending cantrip.
items.descriptionPlayer: A rolled parchment with tiny stitching patterns in the wax seal

items.name: Driftglobe
items.descriptionDM: This small sphere of thick glass weighs 1 pound. You can use an action to speak its command word and cause it to emanate the Light or Daylight spell. The Daylight effect can be used once per day.
items.descriptionPlayer: A heavy glass sphere, perfectly smooth, with a faint cloudiness swirling inside

items.name: Cloak of Billowing
items.descriptionDM: While wearing this cloak, you can use a bonus action to make it billow dramatically. No other mechanical benefit.
items.descriptionPlayer: A fine cloak that seems to ripple and flow even in still air

items.name: Moon-Touched Longsword
items.descriptionDM: In darkness, the unsheathed blade of this longsword sheds moonlight, creating bright light in a 15-foot radius and dim light for an additional 15 feet. It is a magic weapon.
items.descriptionPlayer: A longsword with a pale, almost silvery blade that seems to catch light that isn't there

items.name: Hat of Disguise
items.descriptionDM: While wearing this hat, you can use an action to cast the Disguise Self spell from it at will. The spell ends if the hat is removed.
items.descriptionPlayer: An unremarkable felt hat that never quite looks the same way twice

items.name: Ruby of the War Mage
items.descriptionDM: This 1-inch-diameter ruby can be attached to a weapon. The weapon can then be used as a spellcasting focus.
items.descriptionPlayer: A deep red gemstone, perfectly round, warm to the touch

items.name: Clockwork Amulet
items.descriptionDM: This copper amulet contains tiny interlocking gears. Once per day when you make an attack roll, you can forgo rolling the d20 to get a 10 on the die.
items.descriptionPlayer: A copper pendant with tiny moving parts visible through a glass face, softly ticking

items.name: Potion of Climbing
items.descriptionDM: When you drink this potion, you gain a climbing speed equal to your walking speed for 1 hour. The potion is separated into brown, silver, and gray layers.
items.descriptionPlayer: A curious potion with three distinct layered colors that refuse to mix

items.name: Ear Horn of Hearing
items.descriptionDM: While held up to your ear, this horn suppresses the effects of the Deafened condition on you.
items.descriptionPlayer: A small brass horn, ornately shaped, clearly meant to be held near the head

items.name: Bag of Holding
items.descriptionDM: This bag has an interior space considerably larger than its outside dimensions — roughly 2 feet in diameter and 4 feet deep. The bag can hold up to 500 pounds, not exceeding a volume of 64 cubic feet. Weighs 15 pounds regardless of contents. Retrieving an item requires an action.
items.descriptionPlayer: A simple cloth bag that feels oddly light and seems deeper than it should be when you reach inside

items.name: Cloak of Protection
items.descriptionDM: You gain a +1 bonus to AC and saving throws while you wear this cloak. Requires attunement.
items.descriptionPlayer: A finely woven cloak with a subtle shimmer to the fabric, heavier than it looks

items.name: Goggles of Night
items.descriptionDM: While wearing these dark lenses, you have darkvision out to a range of 60 feet. If you already have darkvision, the range increases by 60 feet.
items.descriptionPlayer: A pair of tinted lenses set in a leather frame, the glass almost black

items.name: Gauntlets of Ogre Power
items.descriptionDM: Your Strength score is 19 while you wear these gauntlets. They have no effect if your Strength is already 19 or higher. Requires attunement.
items.descriptionPlayer: Oversized iron gauntlets etched with crude runes, surprisingly warm to the touch

items.name: Potion of Greater Healing
items.descriptionDM: A creature that drinks this potion regains 4d4+4 hit points. The potion's red liquid glimmers brightly when agitated.
items.descriptionPlayer: A larger vial of deep crimson liquid that pulses with a faint inner light

items.name: +1 Longsword
items.descriptionDM: You have a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.
items.descriptionPlayer: A finely crafted longsword with an unusually keen edge that never seems to dull

items.name: +1 Shield
items.descriptionDM: While holding this shield, you have a +1 bonus to AC in addition to the shield's normal AC bonus.
items.descriptionPlayer: A sturdy shield with a faint metallic sheen that doesn't match the material it's made of

items.name: Immovable Rod
items.descriptionDM: This flat iron rod has a button on one end. You can use an action to press the button, which causes the rod to become magically fixed in place. It can hold up to 8,000 pounds.
items.descriptionPlayer: A plain iron rod with a single button on one end, unremarkable except for its perfect balance

items.name: Pearl of Power
items.descriptionDM: While this pearl is on your person, you can use an action to speak its command word and regain one expended spell slot of 3rd level or lower. Once used, this property can't be used again until the next dawn.
items.descriptionPlayer: An iridescent pearl, warm and smooth, that seems to hum faintly when held

items.name: Winged Boots
items.descriptionDM: While wearing these boots, you have a flying speed equal to your walking speed. You can use the boots for up to 4 hours, all at once or in increments. Recharges after 12 hours.
items.descriptionPlayer: Elegant leather boots with small decorative wings at the ankles that occasionally twitch

items.name: Broom of Flying
items.descriptionDM: This wooden broom functions like a mundane broom until you stand astride it and speak its command word. It then hovers beneath you and can be ridden in the air. Flying speed 50 feet, carrying up to 200 pounds at that speed or 400 pounds at 30 feet.
items.descriptionPlayer: A well-made wooden broom that feels strangely buoyant when held

items.name: Alchemy Jug
items.descriptionDM: This ceramic jug can produce various liquids when commanded: up to 2 gallons of fresh water, 1 gallon of salt water, or smaller quantities of acid, beer, honey, mayonnaise, oil, vinegar, or wine per day.
items.descriptionPlayer: A heavy ceramic jug with arcane symbols around the rim, always slightly damp on the outside

items.name: Periapt of Wound Closure
items.descriptionDM: While wearing this pendant, you stabilize whenever you start your turn with 0 hit points. In addition, whenever you roll a Hit Die to regain hit points, double the number of hit points restored.
items.descriptionPlayer: A delicate silver pendant set with a dark red stone that pulses faintly, like a heartbeat

items.name: Boots of Elvenkind
items.descriptionDM: While you wear these boots, your steps make no sound, regardless of the surface. You also have advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks that rely on moving silently.
items.descriptionPlayer: Soft leather boots of elven make, impossibly light and supple

items.name: Cloak of Elvenkind
items.descriptionDM: While you wear this cloak with its hood up, Wisdom (Perception) checks made to see you have disadvantage, and you have advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide.
items.descriptionPlayer: A gray-green cloak that seems to shift color slightly depending on your surroundings

items.name: Eyes of Charming
items.descriptionDM: These crystal lenses fit over the eyes. While wearing them, you can use an action to cast Charm Person (save DC 13) on a humanoid within 30 feet. Once used three times, they can't be used again until the next dawn.
items.descriptionPlayer: A pair of crystal lenses in a fine wire frame, with an oddly compelling sparkle

items.name: Spell Scroll (2nd Level)
items.descriptionDM: A spell scroll bearing a random 2nd-level spell. If the spell is on your class's spell list, you can read the scroll and cast the spell without material components.
items.descriptionPlayer: A scroll sealed with wax and inscribed with dense, glowing script

items.name: Potion of Fire Breath
items.descriptionDM: After drinking this potion, you can use a bonus action to exhale fire at a target within 30 feet. The target must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw, taking 4d6 fire damage on a failed save or half on a success. The effect ends after three uses or 1 hour.
items.descriptionPlayer: A bubbling orange liquid that radiates warmth even through the glass vial

items.name: Potion of Growth
items.descriptionDM: When you drink this potion, you gain the 'enlarge' effect of the Enlarge/Reduce spell for 1d4 hours (no concentration required).
items.descriptionPlayer: A thick green potion that seems to push against the cork from inside the bottle

items.name: Flame Tongue Longsword
items.descriptionDM: You can use a bonus action to speak this magic sword's command word, causing flames to erupt from the blade. The flames shed bright light in a 40-foot radius and dim light for an additional 40 feet. While ablaze, the sword deals an extra 2d6 fire damage. The flames last until you use a bonus action to speak the command word again or until you drop or sheathe the sword.
items.descriptionPlayer: An ornate longsword with faintly reddish steel and an unusually warm grip. The metal seems to shimmer like heated air.

items.name: Ring of Protection
items.descriptionDM: You gain a +1 bonus to AC and saving throws while wearing this ring. Requires attunement.
items.descriptionPlayer: A thin band of silver-white metal, almost weightless, with a faintly etched pattern you can't quite make out

items.name: Amulet of Health
items.descriptionDM: Your Constitution score is 19 while you wear this amulet. It has no effect if your Constitution is already 19 or higher. Requires attunement.
items.descriptionPlayer: A heavy gold amulet set with a deep green stone. It feels warm against the chest.

items.name: Belt of Hill Giant Strength
items.descriptionDM: While wearing this belt, your Strength score is set to 21. It has no effect if your Strength is already 21 or higher. Requires attunement.
items.descriptionPlayer: A thick leather belt with an oversized iron buckle carved with crude, powerful-looking runes

items.name: Cloak of Displacement
items.descriptionDM: While you wear this cloak, it projects an illusion that makes you appear to be standing near your actual location. Attack rolls against you have disadvantage. If you take damage, this property ceases to function until the start of your next turn.
items.descriptionPlayer: A dark cloak that makes your eyes water slightly if you stare at it too long — its edges seem blurred

items.name: +2 Longsword
items.descriptionDM: You have a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.
items.descriptionPlayer: A masterwork longsword of exceptional quality, the blade hums faintly when drawn

items.name: +2 Shield
items.descriptionDM: While holding this shield, you have a +2 bonus to AC in addition to the shield's normal AC bonus.
items.descriptionPlayer: An imposing shield that seems to deflect light oddly, as if the air around it bends slightly

items.name: Ring of Spell Storing
items.descriptionDM: This ring stores spells cast into it, holding them until the attuned wearer uses them. The ring can store up to 5 levels worth of spells at a time.
items.descriptionPlayer: A ring carved from a single piece of dark crystal, with what appear to be tiny flecks of light moving inside

items.name: Potion of Superior Healing
items.descriptionDM: A creature that drinks this potion regains 8d4+8 hit points.
items.descriptionPlayer: A vial of deep ruby liquid that swirls on its own and feels warm in your hand

items.name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Silver Raven)
items.descriptionDM: This silver statuette of a raven can become a real raven for up to 12 hours. Once used, it can't be used again until 2 days have passed. While in raven form, you can cast Animal Messenger on it at will.
items.descriptionPlayer: A beautifully detailed silver raven figurine, its eyes are tiny garnets that seem to follow you

items.name: Cape of the Mountebank
items.descriptionDM: While wearing this cape, you can use it to cast Dimension Door as an action. This property can't be used again until the next dawn. When you disappear, you leave behind a cloud of smoke.
items.descriptionPlayer: A theatrical crimson cape with a faint smell of sulfur and stage smoke woven into its fabric

items.name: Helm of Teleportation
items.descriptionDM: This helm has 3 charges. While wearing it, you can use an action and expend 1 charge to cast Teleport from it. The helm regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.
items.descriptionPlayer: An ornate metal helm with arcane circuitry traced in silver across its surface

items.name: Portable Hole
items.descriptionDM: This fine black cloth, soft as silk, folds up to the size of a handkerchief. When unfolded and placed on a surface, it creates a 6-foot-wide, 10-foot-deep extradimensional hole. Placing the portable hole inside a bag of holding creates a rift to the Astral Plane.
items.descriptionPlayer: A piece of silk-like black cloth that seems impossibly dark, as if looking into nothing at all

items.name: Necklace of Fireballs
items.descriptionDM: This necklace has 1d6+3 beads hanging from it. You can use an action to detach a bead and throw it up to 60 feet away. When it reaches the end of its trajectory, it detonates as a 3rd-level Fireball (save DC 15).
items.descriptionPlayer: A delicate chain strung with several small red-orange beads that are uncomfortably warm

items.name: Staff of Power
items.descriptionDM: This staff has 20 charges for its properties. While holding it, you gain a +2 bonus to AC, saving throws, and spell attack rolls. The staff can be used to cast a variety of spells. If the last charge is expended, there is a 5% chance the staff explodes (retributive strike option).
items.descriptionPlayer: A tall staff of dark, polished wood with silver bands. The air around it feels charged, like the moment before lightning strikes.

items.name: +3 Longsword
items.descriptionDM: You have a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.
items.descriptionPlayer: A blade of extraordinary craftsmanship, its edge impossibly sharp, the metal seemingly alive with purpose

items.name: +3 Shield
items.descriptionDM: While holding this shield, you have a +3 bonus to AC in addition to the shield's normal AC bonus.
items.descriptionPlayer: A radiant shield that seems to push the air around it, as if maintaining a constant invisible barrier

items.name: Animated Shield
items.descriptionDM: While holding this shield, you can use a bonus action to cause it to animate. The shield leaps into the air and hovers in your space to protect you, leaving your hands free. The shield remains animated for 1 minute or until you use a bonus action to end this effect.
items.descriptionPlayer: A well-balanced shield that occasionally vibrates slightly, as if impatient to move

items.name: Belt of Fire Giant Strength
items.descriptionDM: While wearing this belt, your Strength score is set to 25. It has no effect if your Strength is already 25 or higher.
items.descriptionPlayer: A belt of scorched red leather and black iron, the buckle forged in the shape of a burning fist

items.name: Crystal Ball
items.descriptionDM: This crystal ball is about 6 inches in diameter. While touching it, you can cast Scrying (save DC 17) with it.
items.descriptionPlayer: A flawless crystal sphere that clouds and clears seemingly at random, occasionally showing faint shapes

items.name: Dancing Sword
items.descriptionDM: You can use a bonus action to toss this magic sword into the air and speak the command word. It hovers, flies to a creature within 30 feet, and attacks it using your attack bonus. On each of your turns, you can use a bonus action to direct it to a new target. After 4 rounds, it returns to your hand.
items.descriptionPlayer: A longsword with an almost weightless feel, as if gravity barely applies to it

items.name: Potion of Supreme Healing
items.descriptionDM: A creature that drinks this potion regains 10d4+20 hit points.
items.descriptionPlayer: A large vial of brilliant scarlet liquid that glows from within, warm even through thick glass

items.name: Rod of Alertness
items.descriptionDM: This rod has 6 charges. While holding it, you have advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks and on initiative rolls. You can also plant the rod in the ground and use an action to speak a command word, casting Alarm, Detect Evil and Good, Detect Magic, Detect Poison and Disease, or See Invisibility.
items.descriptionPlayer: An iron rod topped with a sculpted eye that seems a bit too lifelike for comfort

items.name: Robe of Stars
items.descriptionDM: This black or dark blue robe is embroidered with small white or silver stars. You gain +1 to saving throws while wearing it. Six stars on the robe can be pulled off and used as spell components — each can cast Magic Missile at 5th level. Stars regrow at dawn.
items.descriptionPlayer: A dark robe with embroidered stars that occasionally seem to twinkle, as if reflecting an unseen sky

items.name: Tome of Understanding
items.descriptionDM: This book contains intuition and insight exercises. If you spend 48 hours over 6 or fewer days studying the book, your Wisdom score increases by 2, as does your maximum for that score. The book then loses its magic for a century.
items.descriptionPlayer: A thick leather-bound tome that feels heavy with purpose. The pages seem to shift when not being read directly.

items.name: Manual of Bodily Health
items.descriptionDM: This book contains health and diet tips. If you spend 48 hours over 6 or fewer days studying the book, your Constitution score increases by 2, as does your maximum for that score. The book then loses its magic for a century.
items.descriptionPlayer: A surprisingly sturdy book bound in what looks like dragonhide. Simply holding it makes you feel healthier.

items.name: Deck of Many Things
items.descriptionDM: Usually found in a box or pouch, this deck contains a number of cards made of ivory or vellum. Most (75 percent) of these decks have only thirteen cards, but the rest have twenty-two. Before you draw, you must declare how many cards you intend to draw and then draw them randomly. Any cards drawn in excess of this number have no effect. As soon as you draw a card, its magic takes effect. Effects range from gaining wishes to being imprisoned on another plane.
items.descriptionPlayer: A worn velvet pouch containing a set of oversized cards. They feel oddly slippery and never stack quite right. The shopkeeper handles them very, very carefully.

items.name: Holy Avenger
items.descriptionDM: You gain a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit a fiend or an undead with it, that creature takes an extra 2d10 radiant damage. While you hold the drawn sword, it creates a 10-foot aura. You and all creatures friendly to you in the aura have advantage on saving throws against spells.
items.descriptionPlayer: A greatsword of blinding silver that radiates palpable warmth. Its crossguard is shaped like outstretched wings.

items.name: Luck Blade
items.descriptionDM: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. While the sword is on your person, you gain a +1 bonus to saving throws. The sword has 1d4-1 charges (minimum 0). You can use a charge to cast Wish.
items.descriptionPlayer: A short sword that feels impossibly right in your hand, as if it was always meant to be there. Somehow lucky just to hold.

items.name: Ring of Three Wishes
items.descriptionDM: While wearing this ring, you can use an action to expend 1 of its 3 charges to cast the Wish spell from it. The ring becomes nonmagical when the last charge is expended.
items.descriptionPlayer: A plain gold ring with three tiny sapphires. Two seem dull, but one still catches the light brilliantly.

items.name: Vorpal Sword
items.descriptionDM: You gain a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you attack a creature with this weapon and roll a 20 on the attack roll, you cut off one of the creature's heads (if it has one). If the creature can't survive without the head, it dies.
items.descriptionPlayer: A greatsword so sharp the air itself seems to part around the blade. Looking at the edge too closely makes your eyes hurt.

items.name: Robe of the Archmagi
items.descriptionDM: This elegant garment provides AC 15 + Dexterity modifier if you aren't wearing armor. You also have advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects. Your spell save DC and spell attack bonus each increase by 2.
items.descriptionPlayer: A robe of unearthly beauty that seems to be woven from liquid starlight. It changes color subtly as it moves.

items.name: Scarab of Protection
items.descriptionDM: This scarab-shaped brooch has 12 charges. If you fail a saving throw against a necromancy spell or a harmful effect from an undead creature, you can use a reaction to expend 1 charge to turn the failed save into a successful one. It also grants advantage on saving throws against spells.
items.descriptionPlayer: A gold brooch shaped like a scarab beetle, inlaid with lapis lazuli. It feels ancient and protective.

items.name: Staff of the Magi
items.descriptionDM: This staff has 50 charges. While holding it, you gain a +2 bonus to spell attack rolls. You can use an action to expend charges to cast various powerful spells. The staff regains 4d6+2 charges daily at dawn. If the last charge is spent, there is a 5% chance it is destroyed in a retributive strike.
items.descriptionPlayer: A tall staff of ancient wood bound in arcane metals. Reality itself seems to bend slightly around it. Even non-magic users feel its power.

items.name: Armor of Invulnerability
items.descriptionDM: You have resistance to nonmagical damage while wearing this armor. Additionally, you can use an action to make yourself immune to nonmagical damage for 10 minutes or until you are no longer wearing the armor. Once used, this action can't be used again until the next dawn.
items.descriptionPlayer: Full plate armor that gleams with an inner light. Despite its bulk, it feels no heavier than leather.
